finding: The deployment-target consistency validator is now imported by cloudflare-access-workflow-contract.test.mjs, which is already executed by the Cloudflare deployment workflow before readiness probing and deployment.
enforced_invariants: Pages build output directory equals dot
Wrangler deploy command project equals mirror-cartographer-research
Every CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT workflow value equals mirror-cartographer-research

verification.method: isolated Node execution of the committed validator logic against exact current project identifiers extracted from the fetched Wrangler and workflow source

limits: No GitHub Actions run was available during this run.
No Cloudflare deployment was attempted because required environment credentials remain externally unverified.
The isolated check verifies deterministic contract behavior, not hosted deployment identity or URL resolution.
falsification_route: Change any Wrangler, deploy-command, or metadata-verifier project identifier and run node --test cloudflare-static/cloudflare-access-workflow-contract.test.mjs; the gate must fail before deployment.
privacy_boundary: Contains repository configuration identities and test results only; no secret values, private chat, health data, diagnosis, or treatment claims.
